item.title: Brex 通过观察代理实际做什么来构建其人工智能代理策略，而不是先编写规则
item.summary: OpenClaw has become one of the most widely adopted agentic frameworks, but it has yet to prove itself at enterprise scale. Agents need real credentials — API keys, OAuth tokens, service accounts — to work effectively, and Brex found that traditional guardrails couldn't contain what those agents were doing with them. Br
